segments.text: This is not a water balloon. It is a
future of drinking water and it is
completely safe. We accept bad designs
every day. But I found some product
which are actually fixing our broken
world. Let me show you. Number one, this
buckleless belt. Why do you let big
metal buckles poke your stomach? This
design just snaps onto your side loops.
It holds your pant up without the
pressure. It looks clean and finally
comfortable. Number two, we have single
serve wine. In Korea, they realized
opening a bottle for one drink is
inefficient. So, they sealed the glass
itself. It's a grabandgo luxury that
solves the leftover wine problem
instantly. But finally, we have Oho. You
know that plastic bottles literally kill
our nature. So, this blob is made from
algae and plants. It holds water
perfectly, but biodegrades in weeks. You
just bite and sip. It's weird, but it
might save the planet. Would you try it?
Let me know in the comment.
